_comment: Verified-date registry. `policy.js health` flags entries whose verified date is older than reviewEveryDays. When reviewing: web-search current state, update value + verified date, and propagate to shipping apps consistently.

anthropic-model-fast.notes: BYOK fast tier in shipping apps. Copy exact ID from a-reference-app/server/ai.js.

anthropic-model-smart.notes: BYOK smart tier in shipping apps.

openai-model-fast.notes: BYOK fast tier in shipping apps.

openai-model-smart.notes: BYOK smart tier in shipping apps. AEO also uses gpt-5.5-2026-04-23 top tier.

node-lts.notes: CI setup-node version and local nvm target.

gh-action-checkout.notes: On review: pin to commit SHA for supply-chain hardening.

gh-action-setup-node.notes: On review: pin to commit SHA for supply-chain hardening.

gh-action-gitleaks.notes: Replace with a Betterleaks action when one is published. Pin to SHA on review.

secret-scanner.notes: Homebrew only. Successor to gitleaks by same author.

claude-session-model.notes: Session model is the developer's choice. Mechanical subagents are pinned to haiku via ~/.claude/agents/ definitions.
